titleStmt.title: SII 20.228: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 228. (B.K. No. 77 of 1935-36.) KALKĒRI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Pillar in the temple of Sōmēśvara.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 17, Prabhava, Mārgaśira, śu. 11 Monday. The details of the date are irregular. The year Prabhava coincides with A.D. 1207, but the details do not agree with that year. But in the previous year, i.e. Kshaya, the details regularly correspond to A.D. 1206, November 13, Monday, ·06, which seems to be the intended date. According to this reckoning, the commencement of his reign would be A.D. 1190-91, one year earlier than the date suggested by Fleet (Bom. Gaz., Vol. I, Pt. II, p. 503).

The inscription records a gift of land for the offerings to god Svayambhū Sōmanāthadēva and for the feeding of ascetics, by Hariyama-śeṭṭi, the nāḻprabhu of Kalukeṟe, in the presence of the Mummuridaṇḍas, Kācheya-sāhaṇi and Amiteyasāhaṇi. The gift was entrusted to Mūrujāvidēva.
Supplementary gifts for the benefit of the same temple on Śivarātri and other occasions, are also recorded.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahā
rājādhirājaṁ paramēsvaraṁ dvārāvatīpuravarā
dhīsvaraṁ yādavanārāyaṇa pratāpacakravartti hō
śaṇa vīraballāḷadēvavarsada 17 neya prabhava saṁvatsarada
mārggasira suddha 11 byatīpāta sōmavāradaṁdu . svasti sama
stabhuvanavikhyāta paṁcaśatavīrasāsanaladbhu nēkaguṇagaṇālaṁRead �.
krita satyasaucācāracārucāritranayavinayavinyā na vīrāRead jñā.
vatāra vīrabaṇaṁjusamayadharmmapratipāḷakaru
mappa banavase pa(ṁ)nnicchāsirake sirōmaṇi Anā
di heggaḍemane kalukeṟeya nāḷprabhu caladaṁ
karāma hariyammaseṭṭiyaruṁ samasta muṁ
muridaṁḍaṁgaḷuṁ mahāmahēsvaraṁ samaya dharmma
pratipāḷarumappa kāceyasāhaṇiyuṁ śrī
madanādiya paṭṭaṇaṁ Aṇnideṟe yamritēThis is a mistake for Aṇnigeṟe.
svaradēvara dibyaśrīpādapadmārādhakanumappa
muḍagēriyamiteyasahaṇiyaru
yiddu śrī svayaṁbhu sōmanāthadēvara gaṁdha pu
ṣpa dhūpa dīpa neyivēdya tāṁbūḷa tapōdhanara brā
hmaṇara Āhāradānakkaṁ jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ śrīmatu
bhikṣeya mūṟujāvidēvara pādaprakṣālanaṁ māḍi
kalukeṟeya hiriyakeṟeya keḷage gadde kaṁba 20 ttu
hullavāḷalu gadde kaṁba 10 ttu hakkalu kaṁba 20 ttu
vopuṇiseyalu gaddekaṁba ttu hakkalu kaṁbaThere is some space between ba and ttā obviously for the numeral specifying the measure of the land given.
(ba) 20 ttu yiṁtinitumaṁ nāḷprabhu caladaṁkarāma
hariyamaseṭṭiyaru dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi
koṭṭaru śrī sōmanāthadēvara parivāra
gōḷiya benakaṁge gadde kaṁ 5 dēvara gadde
kelamariṁ teṁkaṇa braṁmmeyaniṁ paḍu
vaṇa saru gadde kaṁmma 10 hegeṟeya baḍaga
ṇa kōḍiyalli bisukaṁmma 20 © svasti śrī
manmahāpasāytaṁ paramaviśvāsigaḷu huliya jaṁguḷi
yara mottada kaḷpamudreya vāsiyaṇnanoḷagāda sama
sta nāyakaruṁ Ekkaṭigaruṁ śrīmannāḷprubhu caladaṁ
karāma kalukeṟeya hariymaseṭṭiyaruṁ sivarātreya
parvvadalli dēvara jaḷa gaṁdhākṣate ṣuṟpadīpa dhūpa nivē
dya tāṁbūḷa Ācāriyara tapōdhanara brāhma(ṁ)ṇara bhōjanakaṁ jī
rṇnōddhārakkanteṁdu mattihaḷḷiya heggeṟeya baḍagaṇa kōḍiya
saṁkina yīriya keḷage bisukaṁ 10 Ā sthaḷadalli hakkalu kaṁ
20 vaṁ nāḷprabhu caladaṁkarāma hariyama seṭṭiyaruṁ ma
ga vīrayagauḍanuṁ mūṟujāvidēvara pādaprakṣāḷanaṁ
māḍi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . svasti śrīmaṁnā
ḷpra(pra)bhu hariyamaseṭṭiyaru maga vīrayanu
banadeyanāyaka jōyanāyaka rāgavanāyaka
sēnaba caṭṭayya Ekaṭigaruṁ caitrada parvvadalu dēRead sēnabōva.
variṁge ho jaḷagaṁdhākṣate puspa
dhūpa dīpa nivēdya tāṁbūḷa tapōdhanara brāhmaṇa
ra Āhāradānakkaṁ jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ
geṟeya keḷage hariya kōlali gadde kaṁ 10
śrīmatu svayaṁbhu dēvarige Iḍikiseṭṭiyaru sama
sta prajegaḷu Eṁṭu hiṭṭugaḷu guru dēvaraṁ
mūṟu ho(ṁ)nna vriddhiIṁda Oṁdu naṁdādīvige
ya naḍasuvaru Iḍakiseṭṭi puṇyageyda
© svasti śrīmatu sarvvādhikāri lakumeya rāhuta
ṇapāḷadēvaṁge binnapaṁgeIdu kalukeṟeya śrīsvayaṁ
bhudēvara Aṁgabhōgakaṁ jīrṇnōddhārakaṁ haḷa bhū
miya dhāreya Eṟadu koṭṭaru Aravattala .
Digital edition of SII 20.228 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
